pi_items.source: Found in export_result.sh and verifier.py as the required output file.
Found in export_result.sh and setup_task.sh as the working directory.
Found in setup_task.sh as the data file copied to the working directory. Verified by downloading the Crampton 1947 dataset.
Matches task description and verified in verifier.py as the required test value for the t-test.
Confirmed by downloading the real ToothGrowth.csv dataset from the Rdatasets repository which contains the 'len' column. Matches task description and verifier.py.
Confirmed by analyzing verifier.py which explicitly checks for these analysis options being enabled in the Jamovi .omv file.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires performing a One Sample T-Test on the 'len' variable from the real ToothGrowth dataset (Crampton 1947) against a test value of 20. The agent must save the results to '/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/OneSampleTTest_ToothGrowth.omv' with specific options enabled: Student's t, Wilcoxon rank, mean difference, effect size, confidence interval, descriptives, Shapiro-Wilk (norm), and Q-Q plot.
